ground_truth.title: Affordable Social Media Marketing Packages & Pricing
ground_truth.main_content:
Social Media Marketing Packages Designed Ideally For Your Business

Are you looking to have a comprehensive and results-driven social media marketing package that aligns with the business's unique goals? At Softtrix, our expertly curated social media management packages are designed to potentially make the brand grow, engage and convert the audience across leading platforms like Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X and more.

Did you know?

As per the estimation given, there are 5.42 billion total social media users worldwide, with an average person using 6.83 different social networks per month. The social media advertising spend is projected to cross $276.7 billion in 2025, with 83% of ad spend total generated on mobile by 2030. The video content generally appears to be popular, with 78% of people preferring to learn about new products through short video content, and 93% of marketers reporting will spend more time on social marketing in 2025 as 90% of the consumers rely directly on to social media to keep themselves up with the trends and the cultural moments.

Softtrix’s Conduct with Social Media Packages

No matter if you are a startup or an established enterprise, we offer flexible and scalable social media packages that not just fit the user's needs but also help businesses to shine all the way long.

Strategy Development
We design a customised social media strategy that is aligned well with the brand voice, goals and the target audience.

Content Creation & Design
We professionally write a post and design eye-catching visuals to meet the particular media’s audience’s needs.

Platform Management
Our experts conduct daily monitoring, posting and seamless engagement across selected channels.

Audience Engagement
We perform timely responses to comments and messages to develop community and business trust.

Performance Tracking & Reporting
We allow businesses to access the detailed monthly reports and analytics to measure the growth, engagement and conversions.

Paid Ad Campaign Management
We run paid ad campaigns that are designed uniquely for audience targeting and to empower lead generation.

Let’s Build a Strong & Robust Brand Using Effective Social Media Packages.

From looking after startups to enterprises, we have packages for every business type. You can now easily compare the features, social media management pricing, and platforms, and choose what suits your business needs.

Social Media Management Pricing

We offer a scalable and competitive social media management pricing to suit businesses of all sizes. Our social media packages pricing is well-structured and aids in delivering value and measurable results.

Package	Ideal For	Platforms	Posts/Week	Engagement	Reporting	Price/Month
Starter	Small Businesses	1-2	3	Available	Monthly	$399
Growth	Mid-size Brands	3-4	5	Available	Bi-weekly	$699
Pro	Large Businesses	Up to 5	Daily	Available	Weekly	$999
Custom	Enterprises	Any	Tailored	Full Service	Custom	On Request

Social Media Platforms We Manage

We deliver end-to-end social media marketing services packages across all the major platforms to help the brand connect with the right audience, at the right time and in the correct place.

Facebook Marketing
Facebook marketing is a powerhouse for B2C and B2B marketing. We create engaging content, run highly targeted ad campaigns, manage community interactions and increase brand visibility, drive traffic and generate leads.

Instagram Marketing
Instagram marketing is a perfect match for a visually driven brand. From reels and stories to carousel posts, we aid businesses in showcasing the products, promoting the brand, and engaging the audience with compelling visual content that drives conversion and builds loyalty.

LinkedIn B2B Marketing
LinkedIn is ideal for professional networking and B2B outreach. LinkedIn marketing strategy positions you as an industry leader. Here we curate the thought-based leadership content, manage the company pages, run sponsored ads and generate quality leads.

X (Twitter) Management
X(formerly Twitter) is where real-time conversation matters. We manage with the tweets, threads, trends and the engagement to ensure the brand stays consistent, timely and connected with followers and the industry influencers.

Pinterest & TikTok Strategy
We help users tap into Pinterest’s high-intent audience and TikTok’s viral potential. Whether it is to drive website visits through pins or to create short-form, shareable videos for TikTok, we design content that amplifies reach and engagement.

YouTube Channel Management
If the video is premier content, then YouTube is the throne. Our team of experts look after channel optimisation, video SEO, content planning, and performance analytics. Our presence is to grow subscribers, boost views and maximise watch time.

Who are our Social Media Packages For?

We design tailored social media management packages, helping users to meet their unique business needs at every stage of their growth.

Startups Seeking Online Visibility
Gain traction fast with a strong yet advanced social media foundation, brand awareness, and engaging content that makes the business stand out.

Local Businesses Targeting their Community
Connect with the nearby customers and promote special offers while building loyalty using hyperlocal content and targeted outreach.

E-commerce Brand Promoting the Products
Here we aid businesses to showcase the products with high-converting visuals, influencer collaborations and the conversion-focused campaigns that drive sales.

SaaS & B2B Companies Building Trust
Share the most valuable insights, thought leadership and the success stories to establish credibility and to attract qualified leads.

Enterprise Scaling Their Digital Presence
We utilise the full-scale business strategy to advance the analytics and to amplify the reach, manage reputation and maximise the ROI.

Request For Free Social Media Consultation Today!

Are you ready to take your first step towards transforming your online presence? You might need to speak with our experts and goal managers to discover the effective social media marketing packages.

Benefits of Our Social Media Marketing Packages

Our social media packages are more than just posts and user metrics, they are strategically designed to grow the brand with a measurable impact.

Platform Focused Strategy
We design our unique approach to each platform, whether it requires Instagram reels, LinkedIn articles, or TikTok Videos, to maximise the user reach, relevance and the ROI.

Increased Engagement & Brand Awareness
We enable consistent posting, targeted content and community interaction that help users to build trust, boost user engagement and enhance the brand’s recall factor.

Lead Generation & Conversions
With conversion-focused campaigns, we help businesses move beyond the likes and the followers, helping them to access the real leads, website traffic and the sales.

Time Saving & Cost Efficient
Businesses can outsource their social media efforts so that our dedicated experts can support the internal team and focus on the core business goals.

Data Driven Insights
We allow businesses to have data-driven insights and to keep them traced using performance reports and actionable insights, and to continuously refine their business strategies.

Scalable Packages
Whether you are just starting or scaling fast, our social media packages pricing and packages evolve with the business growth and will complement your journey all the way.

Why Choose Us?

We go above and beyond to post the relevant content on our social media handles. We deliver real business growth using powerful, platform-specific social media strategies.

Experienced Social Media Strategists
We have a team of certified experts who understand the platform algorithms, content trends, and the behaviour of the audience.

Industry Specific Content Expertise
We craft tailored messaging no matter which industry, such as tech, healthcare, finance, retail or beyond.

Proven Track Record of Growth
We have helped a dozen clients to increase their user engagement, followers, and to analyse the consistent and high-quality campaigns.

Flexible Contracts – No Hidden Costs
We offer a commitment of free monthly packages to upgrade with flexibility, enabling complete clarity on what the clients are paying for.

Frequently Asked Questions

Which social media marketing service packages are ideal for businesses?
This is a tricky question to answer about what social media marketing services packages might be an ideal match for the business. But at Softtrix, our team offers a free consultation to understand the business’s unique goals, audience and the platforms. Based on the analysis, we recommend suitable social media management pricing and packages.

Can Softtrix upgrade or downgrade the social media packages pricing later?
Yes! We at Softtrix enable the flexibility to opt for preferred social media packages pricing as per convenience. We can help businesses upgrade and downgrade their packages, enabling customisation of the plans with their evolving needs.

How much do the social media marketing services packages cost for the business?
The costing of the social media marketing services packages depends on the business, scope, and the features included. There are some basic social media management packages to start at a thousand rupees, while other comprehensive plans could cost up to lakhs per month.

What are the benefits of using social media management packages?
The social media management packages allow businesses to access improved brand awareness, improved audience engagement, time savings and data-driven insights for better decision making.

How long does the social media package take to reflect the results?
It generally takes up to 3-6 months to witness the significant results from social media marketing, and in such cases, it can take up to a year or more, especially in competitive industries. The initial engagement can be seen within a few days, but a substantial following and seeing requires time to turn into conversion results.
